london.introText: We film at London's leading event venues, from the sprawling halls of ExCeL to boutique conference spaces across the City. Our crews know the unique challenges of each space—parking, permits, power, lighting—and arrive prepped.

venues.name: ExCeL London
venues.description: Europe's largest exhibition and conference center. 100,000+ sq meters of flexible space hosting everything from tech conferences to major trade shows.
venues.filmingTips: Massive halls mean wireless mic range is critical. Bring backup power. Permit required; we handle it.

venues.name: Olympia London
venues.description: Historic 40,000 sq meter venue in West Kensington. Host to The RDS, travel expos, and industry conferences. Iconic architecture and challenging lighting.
venues.filmingTips: Ornate ceiling = complex lighting setup. Elevated stages require long lenses. Crew parking available but limited.

venues.name: Business Design Centre
venues.description: Victorian Grade II listed building in Islington. 4,500 sq meters of elegant event space. Popular for B2B conferences, product launches, and corporate events.
venues.filmingTips: Beautiful natural light but mixed with spotlights. Limited rigging points. Intimate scale suits close-up interviews.

venues.name: Queen Elizabeth II Centre
venues.description: Modern 6,000 sq meter venue in Westminster. Flexible layouts, excellent lighting infrastructure, and direct access to iconic London landmarks.
venues.filmingTips: State-of-the-art AV infrastructure. Excellent power distribution. High-profile events mean security protocols.

venues.name: The Brewery
venues.description: 1,600 sq meter converted Victorian brewery in Chiswell Street. Exposed brick, soaring ceilings, natural light. Premium venue for exclusive events.
venues.filmingTips: Dramatic industrial aesthetic. Harsh shadows in some areas. Wide-angle lenses work well. Atmospheric b-roll opportunities.

venues.name: Tobacco Dock
venues.description: 12,000 sq meter historic warehouse on the Thames. Raw, flexible event space hosting large conferences, product launches, and experiential events.
venues.filmingTips: Massive open spaces allow creative camera positioning. Rippling water reflections outside. Weather can be unpredictable.

newyork.introText: We film at New York's premier event venues, from the iconic Jacob K. Javits Convention Center to world-class luxury hotels. Our New York crews excel at capturing high-energy conferences, product launches, and corporate events in Manhattan's most prestigious locations.

venues.name: Jacob K. Javits Convention Center
venues.description: 550,000+ sq ft convention center on the Hudson River with modern facilities and iconic architecture. Major venue for trade shows, conferences, and large-scale events. Recently expanded with 1.2M sq ft of additional space.
venues.filmingTips: Massive halls require strategic crew positioning. Excellent natural light from waterfront windows. State-of-the-art power distribution. Wireless mic range needs careful planning for large spaces.

venues.name: The New York Marriott Marquis Times Square
venues.description: 55 meeting rooms and 55,000 sq ft of event space in the heart of Times Square. Premium hotel venue for corporate conferences, product launches, and high-profile business events. Modern amenities and professional AV infrastructure.
venues.filmingTips: Premium AV infrastructure built-in. Elegant interiors with warm lighting. Broadway theater district backdrop for external shots. High-profile events often require discretion.

venues.name: The Times Center
venues.description: Premier venue at 242 West 41st Street offering versatile spaces that accommodate professional events from intimate meetings to large conferences. Flexible layout options in Midtown Manhattan.
venues.filmingTips: Flexible modular spaces. Professional lighting infrastructure. Central Times Square location with excellent street-level photography opportunities. State-of-the-art AV support.

venues.name: Center 415
venues.description: 30,000 sq ft of open, divisible event space at 415 5th Avenue spanning two floors. Accommodates up to 1,400 guests. Modern industrial aesthetic with high ceilings.
venues.filmingTips: Open floor plan allows creative camera positioning. Natural light from floor-to-ceiling windows. Exposed structural elements create dynamic backdrops. Large unobstructed spaces.

venues.name: The Waldorf Astoria New York
venues.description: Iconic 1931 luxury hotel with recently reopened 43,000 sq ft of venue space including the Grand Ballroom (9,990 sq ft). Part of $2 billion renovation. Historic elegance meets modern facilities.
venues.filmingTips: Ornate ballroom ceiling = complex lighting setup. Historic architectural elements provide character. Professional hotel AV support. High-profile clientele = security protocols.

venues.name: Windrose on Hudson
venues.description: 52,000 sq ft of indoor event space in the Hudson Valley reopened June 2025. Includes 340-seat amphitheater and 50 breakout rooms. Scenic location with modern facilities.
venues.filmingTips: Amphitheater provides dramatic camera angles. Multiple breakout rooms allow simultaneous coverage. Scenic Hudson Valley backdrop. Modern infrastructure throughout.

venues.name: Roma Eventi Conference Centre

tokyo.introText: We film at Tokyo's most prestigious event venues, from the Tokyo International Forum to world-class luxury hotels like The Okura and Mandarin Oriental. Our Tokyo crews excel at capturing high-energy tech conferences, international business summits, and corporate galas.

venues.name: Tokyo International Forum
venues.description: Premier event venue with Hall A seating 5,012 guests. Iconic glass structure hosts international conferences, concerts, and exhibitions. Located in central Tokyo near government buildings. Modern facilities with excellent sightline design.
venues.filmingTips: Hall A's impressive scale perfect for keynote coverage. Iconic glass architecture provides dynamic backdrops. Excellent natural light through glass exterior. Professional AV infrastructure throughout.

venues.name: The Okura Tokyo
venues.description: Legendary 5-star hotel with conference facilities accommodating 2,000+ guests. Grand ballrooms with traditional décor combined with modern amenities. Premier hotel for high-profile conferences and corporate events. Iconic status in Tokyo business community.
venues.filmingTips: Multiple function spaces allow simultaneous coverage. Blend of traditional and modern design. Professional hotel AV support. Excellent room configurations for different event types.

venues.name: Mandarin Oriental Tokyo
venues.description: Luxury hotel in Nihonbashi business district with Grand Ballroom featuring 360° video wall and advanced AV systems. 30,000+ sqft of meeting and event space. Premier venue for international business forums and executive conferences.
venues.filmingTips: 360° video wall offers cutting-edge technical production opportunities. Contemporary design with excellent lighting. Professional AV infrastructure. Modern, sleek aesthetic for corporate events.

venues.name: The Peninsula Tokyo
venues.description: Five-star hotel in Marunouchi, Tokyo's premier financial district. Extensive meeting and event spaces designed for high-profile meetings, seminars, and functions. Modern luxury with professional event management.
venues.filmingTips: Premium hotel AV infrastructure. Contemporary design with warm lighting. Marunouchi district location provides business backdrop. Professional event coordination team.

venues.name: The Westin Tokyo
venues.description: 438 guest rooms with 30,000 sqft of meeting space across multiple ballrooms and breakout rooms. Modern luxury hotel in central Tokyo. Flexible configurations for corporate conferences, trade shows, and large-scale events.
venues.filmingTips: Large total meeting space allows complex event coverage. Multiple venue options for simultaneous shoots. Modern design with professional AV. Excellent hotel support services.

venues.name: Tokyo Station Hotel
venues.description: Located in Marunouchi business district, one minute walk from Tokyo International Forum. Three elegant event and meeting facilities. Historic location with modern conveniences. Walkable to major business district.
venues.filmingTips: Proximity to Tokyo International Forum allows dual-venue coverage. Historic building with classical architecture. Modern AV infrastructure. Convenient central location.

vienna.introText: We film at Vienna's world-class venues, from Austria Center Vienna with 26,000 sqm of space to the historic HOFBURG Vienna combining imperial heritage with modern technology. Our Vienna crews specialize in capturing international congresses and high-profile business events.

venues.name: Austria Center Vienna
venues.description: 21 halls, 134 meeting rooms, and 5 exhibition halls across 5 levels with 26,000 sqm event space. Capacity 500 to 22,800 people. Largest congress center in Austria. Located 7 minutes from historic old town, near UN headquarters and Danube.
venues.filmingTips: Massive scale allows unlimited flexibility. 134 meeting rooms for complex events. State-of-the-art digital infrastructure. Unique location near UN and Danube.

venues.name: VIECON – Vienna Congress & Convention Center (Messe Wien)
venues.description: Flexible multifunctional spaces with ultra-modern IT infrastructure. One of Europe's most versatile event and exhibition facilities. Spaces from 500 to 60,000 sqm. State-of-the-art technology throughout.
venues.filmingTips: Extraordinary flexibility - 500 to 60,000 sqm. Modern IT infrastructure. State-of-the-art technology. European-scale venue.

venues.name: HOFBURG Vienna
venues.description: Harmoniously combines modern glass architecture with state-of-the-art technology within a former imperial residence. Multiple elegant state rooms and contemporary meeting spaces. Unique historic-modern blend.
venues.filmingTips: Historic imperial palace architecture. Modern glass and contemporary design. State ballrooms. Iconic Vienna location.

venues.name: Hofburg Vienna - Sisi Restaurant & Imperial Ballroom
venues.description: Historic imperial ballroom within Hofburg Palace. Ornate classical architecture with modern AV infrastructure. Premium venue for gala events and high-profile corporate functions in historic setting.
venues.filmingTips: Imperial palace grandeur. Ornate classical architecture. Historic prestige. Professional modern AV support.

venues.name: The Ritz-Carlton Vienna
venues.description: Luxury 5-star hotel with extensive meeting and event facilities in central Vienna. Elegant contemporary design combined with historic location. Multiple ballrooms and flexible meeting spaces.
venues.filmingTips: Luxury hotel aesthetic. Contemporary design. Central Vienna location. Professional AV infrastructure.

venues.name: InterContinental Wien (Vienna)
venues.description: Premier luxury hotel with comprehensive meeting and event facilities. Located along the Danube. Multiple grand ballrooms and flexible conference spaces. Premium international hotel venue.
venues.filmingTips: Danube location with river views. Luxury hotel aesthetic. Modern design. Professional infrastructure.

dubai.introText: We film at Dubai's most prestigious event venues, from the Dubai World Trade Centre to grand luxury resorts like Madinat Jumeirah and the Grand Hyatt. Our Dubai crews specialize in high-profile international conferences, product launches, and luxury corporate events.

venues.name: Dubai World Trade Centre
venues.description: Over 1 million square feet of multipurpose event space. Major venue for exhibitions, international conferences, and large-scale seminars. Modern facilities with professional management. Located in central Dubai with excellent accessibility.
venues.filmingTips: Massive scale requires strategic crew coordination. Multiple interconnected halls. Excellent infrastructure for large productions. Professional technical support. Ample parking.

venues.name: Grand Hyatt Dubai
venues.description: Dubai's largest hotel convention center with 12,500 sqm of flexible event space. Grand ballrooms accommodating 4,000+ guests, intimate meeting rooms, and breakout spaces. Premium hotel with professional event management.
venues.filmingTips: Massive total event footprint (7,000 sqm) allows complex multi-venue coverage. Grand ballrooms have impressive ceiling heights. Professional hotel AV infrastructure. Luxury finishes.

venues.name: JW Marriott Marquis Dubai
venues.description: Only hotel in UAE capable of hosting 1,000+ guest dining and sleeping arrangements. Located on Sheikh Zayed Road on the Dubai Water Canal banks. Extensive meeting and event facilities designed for major international conferences.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic location on Dubai Water Canal. Modern luxury design. Professional AV infrastructure. Can handle massive guest volumes. Excellent for large-scale events.

venues.name: Madinat Jumeirah
venues.description: Spectacular Arabian-themed resort styled as ancient Arabian citadel. Multiple event venues combining opulence with traditional design. Unique venue for corporate galas, product launches, and exclusive events. Waterfront location.
venues.filmingTips: Unique Arabian architecture provides distinctive visual backdrop. Waterfront location with natural scenery. Multiple outdoor event spaces. Atmospheric and cinematic aesthetic.

venues.name: Hilton Dubai Al Habtoor City
venues.description: 1,004 guest rooms with 16 meeting rooms, grand ballroom, and unique Habtoor Theatre for events and meetings. Central Dubai location. Modern facilities designed for comprehensive conference coverage.
venues.filmingTips: Dedicated theatre space for keynotes and performances. Flexible meeting room configurations. Professional hotel support. Modern design with good lighting.

venues.name: Le Méridien Dubai
venues.description: 44,401 sqft of banquet and conference facilities. Spacious parking for 500+ vehicles. Purpose-built venue for banquets, conferences, exhibitions, and major corporate events. Located in heart of Dubai.
venues.filmingTips: Dedicated banquet space with modern design. Ample parking essential for large events. Professional catering and event coordination. Modern AV infrastructure.

hongkong.introText: We film at Hong Kong's world-class venues, from the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre with 91,500 sqm by Victoria Harbour to luxury hotels like Grand Hyatt and Conrad. Our Hong Kong crews specialize in capturing major international conferences, trade fairs, and high-profile corporate events.

venues.name: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre (HKCEC)
venues.description: 91,500 sqm of total rentable space - one of the world's most impressive, efficient convention and exhibition venues. Hosts around 1,000 events annually with 7+ million attendance. Located on edge of iconic Victoria Harbour. Consistently awarded 'Best Convention and Exhibition Centre in Asia.'
venues.filmingTips: 91,500 sqm massive facility. Victoria Harbour location. Professional infrastructure throughout. 1,000+ events annually.

venues.name: Grand Hyatt Hong Kong
venues.description: Directly connected to HKCEC - move from room to event floor in minutes. Luxury hotel with comprehensive meeting facilities. Premium location at Victoria Harbour. World-class service.
venues.filmingTips: Connected to convention centre. Victoria Harbour views. Luxury aesthetic. Professional AV.

venues.name: Conrad Hong Kong
venues.description: Entertains groups up to 1,000 in one of Hong Kong's largest column-free ballrooms. Dedicated meeting floor with 11 function rooms. Premium location with world-class amenities.
venues.filmingTips: 1,000-person ballroom capacity. Column-free design. 11 meeting rooms. Premium location.

venues.name: Renaissance Hong Kong Harbour View Hotel
venues.description: Directly connected to HKCEC. Comprehensive meeting and event facilities. Victoria Harbour location with stunning water views. Professional event management.
venues.filmingTips: Connected to convention centre. Harbour views. Comprehensive facilities. Professional coordination.

venues.name: The St. Regis Hong Kong
venues.description: Luxury 5-star hotel known for personalized butler service. Elegant event venues with premium finishes. Exclusive location with world-class amenities. Premium venue for high-profile events.
venues.filmingTips: Ultra-luxury property. Personalized service. Elegant venues. Premium aesthetic.

venues.name: The Upper House Hong Kong
venues.description: Celebrated for serene atmosphere and spacious rooms. Elegant minimalist design with comprehensive meeting facilities. Premium contemporary luxury venue.
venues.filmingTips: Serene contemporary design. Spacious elegant rooms. Minimalist aesthetic. Professional infrastructure.

istanbul.introText: We film at Istanbul's most prestigious venues, including the Four Seasons at the Bosphorus in a 19th-century palace and Four Seasons at Sultanahmet with views of Hagia Sophia. Our Istanbul crews specialize in capturing high-profile international conferences and luxury corporate events at Europe's gateway to Asia.

venues.name: Four Seasons Istanbul at the Bosphorus
venues.description: 19th-century palace on the Bosphorus strait - one of Istanbul's most prestigious meeting venues. Two elegant indoor ballrooms, six intimate meeting venues, and expansive outdoor terraces. Sparkling Bosphorus views. Studio-quality video conferencing.
venues.filmingTips: Historic palace architecture. Bosphorus waterfront location. Indoor and outdoor spaces. Sparkling water views. Elegant aesthetic.

venues.name: Four Seasons Istanbul at Sultanahmet
venues.description: Located in Old Town, heart of Istanbul near Hagia Sophia. Private dining and elegant meeting venues. Rooftop lounge overlooking Hagia Sophia. Elegant ballroom for weddings and galas. Premium historic location.
venues.filmingTips: Old Town location. Hagia Sophia views from rooftop. Iconic historic backdrop. Elegant ballroom. Cultural prestige.

venues.name: Ciragan Palace Kempinski Istanbul
venues.description: Historic Ottoman palace hotel on the Bosphorus. Multiple elegant ballrooms and meeting spaces. Premium riverside location. Professional event services with cultural prestige.
venues.filmingTips: Ottoman palace architecture. Bosphorus waterfront. Elegant ballrooms. Historic prestige. Scenic location.

venues.name: Marriott Hotel Istanbul
venues.description: Luxury hotel with comprehensive meeting and event facilities. Multiple flexible ballrooms and meeting rooms. Professional AV infrastructure. Premium location with excellent services.
venues.filmingTips: Modern luxury design. Flexible meeting spaces. Professional AV. Contemporary aesthetic.

venues.name: Conrad Istanbul Bosphorus
venues.description: Ultra-luxury hotel on the Bosphorus with stunning water views. Comprehensive event and meeting facilities. Modern luxury combined with scenic location. World-class service.
venues.filmingTips: Bosphorus waterfront location. Luxury contemporary design. Water views. World-class infrastructure.

venues.name: Grand Hyatt Istanbul
venues.description: Modern luxury hotel with extensive meeting and event spaces. Located in central Istanbul. Multiple ballrooms and flexible configurations. Professional event management.

lasvegas.introText: We film at Las Vegas's world-class venues, from The Venetian Convention & Expo Center with 2.25 million sqft to luxury resorts and unique event spaces. Our Las Vegas crews specialize in capturing high-energy trade shows, major conferences, and spectacular product launches.

venues.name: The Venetian Convention & Expo Center
venues.description: 2.25 million sqft - one of the largest exhibition and meeting venues in Las Vegas, integrated with The Venetian and Palazzo resorts. Over 350 customizable meeting rooms. Multiple expo halls offering incredible space and versatility.
venues.filmingTips: Massive scale requires strategic crew planning. 350+ meeting rooms allow unlimited flexibility. Modern AV infrastructure. Part of integrated luxury resort.

venues.name: The Venetian Ballroom
venues.description: 85,000 sqft pillarless ballroom - the largest at The Venetian. Column-free design easily subdivides into up to 12 smaller spaces (4,906 to 60,544 sqft). Ideal for grand-scale events and flexible configurations.
venues.filmingTips: 85,000 sqft column-free space. Incredible ceiling height for creative angles. Highly flexible subdivisions. World-class AV infrastructure.

venues.name: The Palazzo Ballroom
venues.description: Pillarless ballroom on Level 5 of Convention Center. Subdivides into up to 16 separate spaces ranging from 4,200 to 54,770 sqft. Premium venue for mid-to-large scale events with maximum flexibility.
venues.filmingTips: Pillarless design with excellent ceiling height. 16 subdivision options. Flexible for various event sizes. Premium location.

venues.name: Wynn Las Vegas Convention Center
venues.description: Premier luxury resort with extensive convention and event facilities. Modern elegance combined with cutting-edge technology. Multiple grand ballrooms and breakout rooms. Premium Las Vegas venue.
venues.filmingTips: Luxury resort aesthetic. Contemporary design. Professional AV infrastructure. Premium Las Vegas location.

venues.name: Caesars Palace Convention Center
venues.description: Historic iconic Las Vegas property with extensive convention facilities. Multiple grand ballrooms and meeting spaces. Legendary venue status with modern amenities. Premium event infrastructure.
venues.filmingTips: Iconic Las Vegas property. Historic prestige. Modern AV infrastructure. Legendary venue status.

venues.name: Bellagio Convention Center
venues.description: Luxury resort with comprehensive event and conference facilities. Multiple elegant ballrooms and flexible meeting spaces. High-end aesthetic with professional AV support. Premium Las Vegas venue.
venues.filmingTips: Luxury resort design. Elegant ballrooms. Professional infrastructure. Premium aesthetic.
